	font-size: var(--char-font-size-body);
	vertical-align: bottom;
	box-shadow:
	var(--char-shadow-dropdown);
	text-align: left;
	}
	.char-marker-message-wrap.outgoing
	.char-marker-message-bubble {
	border-radius: 
	var(--char-space-14)
	var(--char-space-14)
	var(--char-space-02)
	var(--char-space-14);
	background: 
	color-mix(in srgb,
	var(--char-color-text-accent-03) 55%,
	transparent);
	color: var(--char-color-paper-shadow);
	text-shadow:
	0 var(--char-space-d015)
	var(--char-space-d015)
	var(--char-color-paper-shadow);
	border-color: transparent;
	}
	.char-marker-message-wrap.incoming
	.char-marker-message-bubble {
	border-radius:
	var(--char-space-14)
	var(--char-space-14)
	var(--char-space-14)
	var(--char-space-02);
	color: var(--char-color-text-body);
	background: var(--char-color-paper-shadow);
	border:
	var(--char-border-width-thin)
	solid var(--char-color-paper-edge);
	}
	
	.char-marker-message-sender {
	display: block;
	line-height: var(--char-line-height-body);
	font-family: var(--char-font-family-display);
	font-size: var(--char-font-size-field-label);
	font-weight: 500;
	letter-spacing: var(--char-letter-spacing-label);
	text-transform: uppercase;
	}
	.char-marker-message-wrap.outgoing
	.char-marker-message-sender {
	text-align: right;
	color: var(--char-color-paper-base);
	}
	.char-marker-message-wrap.incoming
	.char-marker-message-sender {
	text-align: left;
	color: var(--char-color-text-faded);
	}

/* ACCESSIBILITY */
	@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
	*, *::before, *::after {
	transition-duration: 0.01ms !important;
	}
	}
</style>
<div class="char-document-wrapper">
<div class="char-document-sheet">
<!-- - DOCUMENT HEADER -->
	<div class="char-document-header">
	<div class="char-header-date">Ref.
	<span id="doc-date"></span></div>
	<div class="char-header-title-text">{{char}}</div>
	<div class="char-header-subtitle-text">
	For {{user}}</div>
<!-- - THEME CONTROLS -->
	<!-- Theme Menu -->
		<div class="char-header-controls-row">
		<div class="char-header-control-field">
		<div class="char-field-label">Paper Palette</div>
		<div class="char-dropdown-select"
		id="dropdown-theme" tabindex="0"
		role="listbox" aria-label="Paper palette"
		aria-expanded="false">
		<div class="char-dropdown-select-face">
		<span class="char-dropdown-select-current-value"
		id="dropdown-theme-value">White</span>
		<span class="char-dropdown-select-chevron"
		aria-hidden="true"></span>
		</div>
	<!-- Theme Options -->
		<ul class="char-dropdown-options-list">
		<li class="char-dropdown-option-item is-selected"
		data-value="0" role="option">White</li>
		<li class="char-dropdown-option-item is-selected"
		data-value="1" role="option">Grey</li>
		<li class="char-dropdown-option-item"
		data-value="2" role="option">Black</li>
		<li class="char-dropdown-option-item"
		data-value="3" role="option">Sepia</li>
		<!-- <li class="char-dropdown-option-item"
		data-value="4" role="option">NAME</li> -->
		</ul>
		</div>
		</div>
<!-- - TEXT CONTROLS -->
	<div class="char-header-control-field">
	<div class="char-field-label">Text Style</div>
	<div class="char-dropdown-select"
	id="dropdown-text-alignment" tabindex="0"
	role="listbox" aria-label="Text style"
	aria-expanded="false">
	<div class="char-dropdown-select-face">
	<span class="char-dropdown-select-current-value"
	id="dropdown-text-alignment-value">Justify</span>
	<span class="char-dropdown-select-chevron"
	aria-hidden="true"></span>
	</div>
	<ul class="char-dropdown-options-list">
	<li class="char-dropdown-option-item is-selected"
	data-value="0" role="option">Justify</li>
	<li class="char-dropdown-option-item"
	data-value="1" role="option">Left</li>
	<li class="char-dropdown-option-item"
	data-value="2" role="option">Right</li>
	</ul>
	</div>
	</div>
	</div>
	</div>
<!-- = DOCUMENT BODY -->
	<div class="char-document-body">
	<div class="char-document-body-ruled-lines">
	<div class="char-scroll-progress-container">
	<div class="char-scroll-progress-bar"
	id="scroll-progress-indicator"></div>
	</div>
	
	<div class="char-letter-text-content align-justified"
	id="letter-text-content" lang="en">
	$1</div>
	</div>
	</div>
<!-- - DOCUMENT FOOTER -->
	<div class="char-document-footer">
	<div class="char-footer-column">
	<div><em> </em></div>
	<div class="char-footer-underline-row">
	Signature & mood</div>
	</div>
	<div class="char-footer-column align-center">
	<span class="char-footer-page-number">— 1 —</span>
	of 1 pages
	</div>
	<div class="char-footer-column align-right">
	<div><em> </em></div>
	<div class="char-footer-underline-row">
	Recipient & date</div>
	</div>
	</div>
	</div>
</div>

<script>
/* 01. DATE */
	(function () {
	var dateElement = document.getElementById('doc-date');
	if (dateElement) {
	var now = new Date();
	var month = now.toLocaleString('en-US', { month: 'long' });
	var day = now.getDate();
	var year = now.getFullYear();
	dateElement.textContent = month + ' ' + day + ', ' + year;
	}
/* 02. THEME MAP */
	var themeOptions = [
	{ bodyClass: '', label: 'White' },
	{ bodyClass: 'theme-02', label: 'Grey' },
	{ bodyClass: 'theme-03', label: 'Black' },
	{ bodyClass: 'theme-04', label: 'Sepia' },
	/* { bodyClass: 'theme-05', label: 'NAME' }, */
	];
/* 03. TEXT ALIGNMENT MAP */
	var textAlignmentOptions = [
	{ textClass: 'align-justified', label: 'Justify' },
	{ textClass: 'align-left', label: 'Left' },
	{ textClass: 'align-right', label: 'Right' },
	];
/* 04. PERSISTED STATE */
	function safeGet(key, fallback) {
	try {
	var value = typeof tavo !== 'undefined' ? tavo.get(key) : localStorage.getItem(key);
	return (value !== undefined && value !== null && value !== '') ? String(value) : fallback;
	} catch (_) { return fallback; }
	}
	
	function safeSave(key, value) {
	try { 
	if (typeof tavo !== 'undefined') { tavo.set(key, value); } 
	else { localStorage.setItem(key, value); }
	} catch (_) {}
	}	
	var activeThemeIndex = parseInt(safeGet('chartext_SimplePaper', '0'), 10);
	var activeAlignmentIndex = parseInt(safeGet('chartext_AlignMode', '0'), 10);
	
	if (isNaN(activeThemeIndex) || activeThemeIndex < 0 || activeThemeIndex >= themeOptions.length) activeThemeIndex = 0;
	if (isNaN(activeAlignmentIndex) || activeAlignmentIndex < 0 || activeAlignmentIndex >= textAlignmentOptions.length) activeAlignmentIndex = 0;
/* 05. APPLY THEME */
	function applyTheme(index) {
	document.body.classList.remove(
	'theme-02', 'theme-03', 'theme-04'/*, 'theme-05'*/);
	if (themeOptions[index].bodyClass) {
	document.body.classList.add(	themeOptions[index].bodyClass);
	}}
/* 06. APPLY TEXT ALIGNMENT */
	function applyTextAlignment(index) {
	var textElement = document.getElementById('letter-text-content');
	if (!textElement) return;
	textElement.classList.remove('align-justified', 'align-left', 'align-right');
	textElement.classList.add(textAlignmentOptions[index].textClass);
	}
/* 07. SYNC DROPDOWN DISPLAY */
	function syncDropdownDisplay(dropdownId, valueElementId, optionsList, activeIndex) {
	var valueElement = document.getElementById(valueElementId);
	if (valueElement) valueElement.textContent = optionsList[activeIndex].label;
	
	var dropdownElement = document.getElementById(dropdownId);
	if (!dropdownElement) return;
	var allOptionItems = dropdownElement.querySelectorAll('.char-dropdown-option-item');
	for (var i = 0; i < allOptionItems.length; i++) {
	allOptionItems[i].classList.toggle('is-selected', i === activeIndex);
	}}
/* 08. CLOSE ALL DROPDOWNS */
	function closeAllDropdowns() {
	var openDropdowns = document.querySelectorAll('.char-dropdown-select.is-open');
	for (var i = 0; i < openDropdowns.length; i++) {
	openDropdowns[i].classList.remove('is-open');
	openDropdowns[i].setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
	}}
/* 09. INIT DROPDOWN */
	function initDropdown(dropdownId, onSelectCallback) {
	var dropdownElement = document.getElementById(dropdownId);
	if (!dropdownElement) return;
	
	dropdownElement.addEventListener('click', function (event) {
	var isAlreadyOpen = dropdownElement.classList.contains('is-open');
	closeAllDropdowns();	if (!isAlreadyOpen) {
	dropdownElement.classList.add('is-open');
	dropdownElement.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');
	}
	event.stopPropagation();
	});
	
	dropdownElement.addEventListener('keydown', function (event) {
	var optionItems = dropdownElement.querySelectorAll('.char-dropdown-option-item');
	var currentIndex = -1;
	for (var i = 0; i < optionItems.length; i++) {
	if (optionItems[i].classList.contains('is-selected')) { currentIndex = i; break; }
	}
	
	if (event.key === 'Enter' || event.key === ' ') {
	event.preventDefault();	dropdownElement.classList.toggle('is-open');
	dropdownElement.setAttribute('aria-expanded', dropdownElement.classList.contains('is-open').toString());
	} else if (event.key === 'ArrowDown') {
	event.preventDefault();
	onSelectCallback((currentIndex + 1) % optionItems.length);
	} else if (event.key === 'ArrowUp') {
	event.preventDefault();
	onSelectCallback((currentIndex - 1 + optionItems.length) % optionItems.length);
	} else if (event.key === 'Escape') {
	dropdownElement.classList.remove('is-open');
	dropdownElement.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
	}
	});
	
	var optionItems = dropdownElement.querySelectorAll('.char-dropdown-option-item');
	for (var i = 0; i < optionItems.length; i++) {
	(function (index) {
	optionItems[index].addEventListener('click', function (event) {
	onSelectCallback(index);
	dropdownElement.classList.remove('is-open');
	dropdownElement.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
	event.stopPropagation();
	});
	})(i);
	}}
	
	document.addEventListener('click', closeAllDropdowns);
/* 10. WIRE UP DROPDOWNS */
	initDropdown('dropdown-theme', function (index) {
	activeThemeIndex = index;
	applyTheme(index);
	syncDropdownDisplay('dropdown-theme', 'dropdown-theme-value', themeOptions, index);
	safeSave('chartext_SimplePaper', String(index));
	});
	
	initDropdown('dropdown-text-alignment', function (index) {
	activeAlignmentIndex = index;
	applyTextAlignment(index);
	syncDropdownDisplay('dropdown-text-alignment', 'dropdown-text-alignment-value', textAlignmentOptions, index);
	safeSave('chartext_AlignMode', String(index));
	});
/* 11. APPLY INITIAL STATE */
	applyTheme(activeThemeIndex);
	applyTextAlignment(activeAlignmentIndex);
	syncDropdownDisplay(
	'dropdown-theme',
	'dropdown-theme-value',
	themeOptions, activeThemeIndex);
	syncDropdownDisplay(
	'dropdown-text-alignment',
	'dropdown-text-alignment-value',
	textAlignmentOptions, activeAlignmentIndex);
	})();
/* 12. STRUCTURAL MARKERS */
    var markersProcessed = false;
    function processMarkers(container) {
    if (!container || markersProcessed) return;
    markersProcessed = true;
// Process the innerHTML
    var html = container.innerHTML;
    var MARKER_RE =
    /\$(Title|NPC|Time|Message)\s*\[([\s\S]*?)\]/g;

    var newHtml = html.replace(MARKER_RE,
    function(match, type, value) {
    type = type.toLowerCase();
    value = value.trim();
    
    if (type === 'message') {
// Look for HTML entities
    var incomingIdx = value.indexOf('<');
    var ltLen = 4;
    var isIncoming = incomingIdx >= 0
    && incomingIdx < 30;
    
    if (!isIncoming) {
// Fallback to raw '<'
    var rawLt = value.match(/<(?![a-zA-Z\/!])/);
    if (rawLt) {
    incomingIdx = rawLt.index;
    ltLen = 1;
    isIncoming = incomingIdx < 30;
    }
    }

    if (!isIncoming) {
    incomingIdx = value.indexOf(':');
    ltLen = 1;
    isIncoming = incomingIdx >= 0
    && incomingIdx < 20;
    }
    
    var outgoingIdx = value.indexOf('>');
    var gtLen = 4;
    var isOutgoing = outgoingIdx >= 0
    && outgoingIdx < 30;
    
    if (!isOutgoing) {
    var rawGt = value.match(/>(?![a-zA-Z\/!])/);
    if (rawGt) {
    outgoingIdx = rawGt.index;
    gtLen = 1;
    isOutgoing = outgoingIdx < 30;
    }
    }
    
    var directionClass
    = isIncoming ? 'incoming' : 'outgoing';
    var bubbleContent = '';
    
    if (isIncoming) {
    var sender = value.slice(0, incomingIdx).trim();
    var msg = value.slice(incomingIdx + ltLen).trim();
    bubbleContent
    = '<span class="char-marker-message-sender">'
    + sender + '</span>'
    + '<span class="char-marker-message-text">'
    + msg + '</span>';
    } else if (isOutgoing) {
    var sender = value.slice(0, outgoingIdx).trim();
    var msg = value.slice(outgoingIdx + gtLen).trim();
    bubbleContent
    = '<span class="char-marker-message-sender">'
    + sender + '</span>'
    + '<span class="char-marker-message-text">'
    + msg + '</span>';
    } else {
    bubbleContent
    = '<span class="char-marker-message-text">'
    + value + '</span>';
    }
    
    return '<div class="char-marker-message-wrap '
    + directionClass + '" data-message-wrap="true">'
    + '<div class="char-marker-message-bubble">'
    + bubbleContent + '</div>' + '</div>';
    } else {
    return '<span class="char-marker-'
    + type + '">' + value + '</span>';
    }
    });
// Inject the HTML back - no white-space
	if (newHtml !== html) {
	newHtml = newHtml.replace(/<\/div>\s*(?:<br\s*\/?>\s*)*<div class="char-marker-message-wrap/gi, '</div><div class="char-marker-message-wrap');
	container.innerHTML = newHtml;
	}
// Snap Bubble to line grid
    setTimeout(function() {
    var lineHeight
    = parseFloat(getComputedStyle(
    container).lineHeight);
    var messageWraps
    = container.querySelectorAll(
    '[data-message-wrap]');
    messageWraps.forEach(function(wrap) {
    var bubble = wrap.querySelector(
    '.char-marker-message-bubble');
    if (bubble && lineHeight) {
    var bubbleHeight = bubble.offsetHeight;
    var linesNeeded
    = Math.ceil(bubbleHeight / lineHeight);
    wrap.style.height
    = (linesNeeded * lineHeight) + 'px';
    }
    });
    }, 100);
    }
    
    setTimeout(function () {
    processMarkers(
    document.getElementById('letter-text-content'));
    }, 0);
</script>

entries.name: Paper Goth - Char
entries.replaceString:
<style>
	@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=UnifrakturMaguntia&family=IM+Fell+English:ital@0;1&family=Cinzel:wght@400;600;700&family=DM+Mono:ital,wght@0,400;0,500;1,400&display=swap');

:root {
	--char-base: 17px; 
	/* ⬆️ change this for font size ⬆️ */
	--char-unit: clamp(0px, calc(var(--char-base)/16), 3px);
	--char-document-max-width:
	clamp(200px, calc(var(--char-base) * 40.00), 600px);
/* = SPACING SCALE */
	--char-space-d015: clamp(0px, calc(var(--char-unit) / 1.5), 2.25px);
	--char-space-005: clamp(0.25px, calc(var(--char-unit) * 0.5), 0.75px);
	--char-space-007: clamp(0.25px, calc(var(--char-unit) * 0.75), 1.2px);
	--char-space-015: clamp(0.75px, calc(var(--char-unit) * 1.5), 2.25px);
	--char-space-01: clamp(0.5px, calc(var(--char-unit) * 1), 1.5px);
	--char-space-02: clamp(1px, calc(var(--char-unit) * 2), 3px);
	--char-space-03: clamp(1.75px, calc(var(--char-unit) * 3), 4.5px);
	--char-space-04: clamp(2px, calc(var(--char-unit) * 4), 6px);
	--char-space-05: clamp(2.5px, calc(var(--char-unit) * 5), 7.5px);
	--char-space-06: clamp(3px, calc(var(--char-unit) * 6), 12px);
	--char-space-07: clamp(3.5px, calc(var(--char-unit) * 7), 10.5px);
	--char-space-08: clamp(4px, calc(var(--char-unit) * 8), 12px);
	--char-space-09: clamp(4.5px, calc(var(--char-unit) * 9), 18px);
	--char-space-10: clamp(5px, calc(var(--char-unit) * 10), 15px);
	--char-space-12: clamp(6px, calc(var(--char-unit) * 12), 18px);
	--char-space-14: clamp(7px, calc(var(--char-unit) * 14), 21px);
	--char-space-16: clamp(8px, calc(var(--char-unit) * 16), 24px);
	--char-space-18: clamp(9px, calc(var(--char-unit) * 18), 27px);
	--char-space-20: clamp(10px, calc(var(--char-unit) * 20), 30px);
	--char-space-22: clamp(11px, calc(var(--char-unit) * 22), 33px);
	--char-space-24: clamp(12px, calc(var(--char-unit) * 24), 36px);
	--char-space-26: clamp(13px, calc(var(--char-unit) * 26), 39px);
	--char-space-28: clamp(14px, calc(var(--char-unit) * 28), 42px);
	--char-space-30: clamp(15px, calc(var(--char-unit) * 30), 45px);
	--char-space-32: clamp(16px, calc(var(--char-unit) * 32), 48px);
	--char-space-34: clamp(17px, calc(var(--char-unit) * 34), 51px);
	--char-space-36: clamp(18px, calc(var(--char-unit) * 36), 54px);
	--char-space-44: clamp(22px, calc(var(--char-unit) * 44), 66px);
	--char-space-48: clamp(24px, calc(var(--char-unit) * 48), 72px);
	--char-space-52: clamp(26px, calc(var(--char-unit) * 52), 78px);
	--char-space-56: clamp(28px, calc(var(--char-unit) * 56), 84px);
	--char-space-60: clamp(30px, calc(var(--char-unit) * 60), 90px);
	--char-space-64: clamp(32px, calc(var(--char-unit) * 64), 96px);
	--char-space-70: clamp(35px, calc(var(--char-unit) * 70), 105px);
/* = GEOMETRY */
	--char-document-padding-outer:
	var(--char-space-05);
	--char-document-padding-inner:
	var(--char-space-18)
	var(--char-space-44)
	var(--char-space-24)
	var(--char-space-52);
	--char-document-padding-header:
	var(--char-space-18)
	var(--char-space-48)
	var(--char-space-16)
	var(--char-space-52);
	--char-document-padding-footer:
	var(--char-space-10)
	var(--char-space-44)
	var(--char-space-16)
	var(--char-space-52);
	--char-document-padding-title:
	var(--char-space-14)
	0
	var(--char-space-12);
	--char-hole-margin-width:
	var(--char-space-34);
	--char-ribbon-top-height:
	var(--char-space-28);
	--char-ribbon-bottom-height:
	var(--char-space-20);
	
	--char-hole-padding:
	var(--char-space-48)
	0 var(--char-space-48)
	var(--char-space-10);
/* + TYPOGRAPHY */
	--char-font-family-script:
	'UnifrakturMaguntia', cursive;
	--char-font-family-body:
	'IM Fell English', serif;
	--char-font-family-display:
	'Cinzel', serif;
	--char-font-family-mono:
	'DM Mono', 'Courier New', monospace;

	--char-font-size-body: var(--char-base);
	--char-font-size-title:
	var(--char-space-24);
	--char-font-size-field-label:
	var(--char-space-08);
	--char-font-size-field-value:
	var(--char-space-09);
	--char-font-size-dropdown-item:
	var(--char-space-09);
	--char-font-size-footnote-number:
	var(--char-space-08);
	--char-font-size-subtitle:
	var(--char-space-09);
	--char-font-size-footer-text:
	var(--char-space-08);
	--char-font-size-page-number:
	var(--char-space-14);
	--char-font-size-ribbon-text:
	var(--char-space-08);
	--char-font-size-marginalia:
	var(--char-space-09);
	
	--char-font-weight-normal: 500;
	--char-font-weight-body: 400;
	--char-font-weight-bold: 600;
	
	--char-line-height-body:
	var(--char-space-24);
	--char-line-height-script:
	var(--char-space-28);
	--char-line-height-footer:
	var(--char-space-12);
	
	--char-letter-spacing-script:
	var(--char-space-005);
	--char-letter-spacing-mono-01:
	var(--char-space-01);
	--char-letter-spacing-mono-02:
	var(--char-space-015);
	--char-letter-spacing-mono-03:
	var(--char-space-02);
	--char-letter-spacing-mono-04:
	var(--char-space-03);
	--char-letter-spacing-mono-05:
	var(--char-space-04);
	--char-letter-spacing-body:
	var(--char-space-007);
/* = BORDERS */
	--char-border-width-thin:
	var(--char-space-01);
	--char-border-width-medium:
	var(--char-space-02);
	--char-border-radius-document-sheet:
	var(--char-space-02);
	--char-border-radius-tape:
	var(--char-space-01);
	--char-border-radius-dropdown:
	var(--char-space-02);
	--char-border-radius-strikethrough:
	var(--char-space-02);
/* = SHAPES & SIZES */
	--char-hole-size:
	var(--char-space-16);
	
	--char-tape-width-01:
	clamp(56px, var(--char-space-56), 112px);
	--char-tape-width-02:
	clamp(48px, var(--char-space-48), 96px);
	--char-tape-width-03:
	clamp(60px, var(--char-space-60), 120px);
	--char-tape-height-01:
	var(--char-space-20);
	--char-tape-height-02:
	var(--char-space-18);
	--char-tape-height-03:
	var(--char-space-18);
	--char-tape-inner-inset:
	var(--char-space-03);
	--char-tape-stripe-gap:
	var(--char-space-05);
	
	--char-spring-branch-size-top-right:
	var(--char-space-32);
	--char-spring-branch-size-bottom-left:
	var(--char-space-26);
	--char-spring-branch-height: 70%;
	--char-spring-leaf-width-large:
	var(--char-space-08);
	--char-spring-leaf-height-large:
	var(--char-space-14);
	--char-spring-leaf-width-small:
	var(--char-space-06);
	--char-spring-leaf-height-small:
	var(--char-space-10);
	--char-spring-flower-width:
	var(--char-space-05);
	--char-spring-flower-height:
	var(--char-space-05);
	
	--char-ribbon-gem-size:
	var(--char-space-07);
	--char-ribbon-circle-size:
	var(--char-space-06);
	--char-ribbon-chevron-size:
	var(--char-space-06);
	--char-ribbon-chevron-border-width:
	var(--char-space-015);
	
	--char-strikethrough-bar-height:
	var(--char-space-03);
	
	--char-footer-heart-width:
	var(--char-space-10);
	--char-footer-heart-height:
	var(--char-space-09);
	--char-footer-heart-dot-size:
	var(--char-space-06);
/* = SHADOWS */
	--char-shadow-document-sheet:
	0 var(--char-space-02)
	var(--char-space-08)
	rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
	--char-shadow-dropdown:
	0 var(--char-space-02)
	var(--char-space-04)
	rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
	--char-text-shadow:
	0 0	var(--char-space-005)
	rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
	--char-hole-shadow:
	inset 0 var(--char-space-01)
	var(--char-space-03)
	rgba(0,0,0,0.25),
	inset 0 0 0 var(--char-space-02)
	rgba(0,0,0,0.05),
	0 var(--char-space-01)
	var(--char-space-02)
	rgba(255,255,255,0.35);
/* - OPACITY */
	--char-opacity-spring-branch: 0.70;
	--char-opacity-spring-leaf-01: 0.55;
	--char-opacity-spring-leaf-02: 0.35;
	--char-opacity-spring-flower: 0.70;
	--char-opacity-marginalia-text: 0.55;
	--char-opacity-ribbon-text: 0.92;
	--char-opacity-ribbon-gem: 0.70;
	--char-opacity-ribbon-circle: 0.55;
	--char-opacity-footer-heart: 0.60;
	--char-opacity-title-corner-bracket: 0.55;
	--char-opacity-dropdown-selected-dot: 0.80;
	--char-opacity-bottom-ribbon: 0.55;
/* = TRANSFORMS */
	--char-rotate-tape-01: -3deg;
	--char-rotate-tape-02: 2deg;
	--char-rotate-tape-03: -1deg;
	--char-rotate-chevron-closed: 45deg;
	--char-rotate-chevron-open: 225deg;
	--char-rotate-spring-branch: -8deg;
	--char-rotate-spring-leaf-01: -40deg;
	--char-rotate-spring-leaf-02: 30deg;
	--char-rotate-spring-leaf-03: -55deg;
	--char-rotate-footer-heart-left: -45deg;
	--char-rotate-footer-heart-right: 45deg;
	--char-rotate-marginalia-text: 90deg;
	--char-translate-x-center: -50%;
	--char-translate-y-chevron:
	calc(var(--char-space-02) * -2);
	--char-translate-y-strikethrough: -50%;
/* = TRANSITIONS */
	--char-transition-speed-fast: 0.35s ease;
	--char-transition-speed-dropdown: 0.25s ease;
/* = RULE LINES */
	--char-rule-text-spacing:
	var(--char-space-22);
	--char-rule-line-spacing:
	calc(var(--char-line-height-body) - var(--char-unit));
	--char-rule-line-height:
	var(--char-line-height-body);
	--char-rule-margin-line-offset:
	calc(var(--char-space-10) * -1);
/* = DROPDOWN ANIMATION */
	--char-dropdown-vertical-offset:
	clamp(0px, var(--char-space-06), 9px);
	--char-dropdown-unfurl-duration: 0.30s;
	--char-dropdown-unfurl-easing:
	cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.75, 0.45, 1);
	--char-dropdown-item-stagger-delay: 0.075s;
/* = WASHI TAPE STRIPE PATTERNS */
	--char-tape-stripe-cycle-01: 
	var(--char-space-06);
	--char-tape-stripe-cycle-02:
	var(--char-space-05);
	--char-tape-stripe-transparent-gap:
	var(--char-space-04);

/* THEME-01 */
	--char-color-paper-base: rgba(240, 232, 215, 1);
	--char-color-paper-shadow: rgba(225, 215, 195, 1);
	--char-color-paper-edge: rgba(140, 110, 75, 1);
	--char-color-paper-deep: rgba(80, 55, 30, 1);
	--char-color-text-body: rgba(20, 15, 10, 1);
	--char-color-text-faded: rgba(100, 75, 50, 1);
	--char-color-text-accent-01: rgba(120, 20, 30, 1);
	--char-color-text-accent-02: rgba(45, 80, 60, 1);
	--char-color-text-accent-03: rgba(90, 65, 110, 1);
	--char-color-hole: rgba(180, 155, 115, 1);
	--char-color-hole-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
	--char-color-rule-line: rgba(20, 15, 10, 0.1);
	--char-color-rule-accent: rgba(120, 20, 30, 0.3);

	--char-color-tape-fill-01: rgba(120, 20, 30, 0.2);
	--char-color-tape-fill-02: rgba(45, 80, 60, 0.2);
	--char-color-tape-fill-03: rgba(90, 65, 110, 0.2);
	--char-color-tape-border-01: rgba(120, 20, 30, 0.45);
	--char-color-tape-border-02: rgba(45, 80, 60, 0.45);
	--char-color-tape-border-03: rgba(90, 65, 110, 0.45);
	--char-color-tape-stripe-01: rgba(120, 20, 30, 0.35);
	--char-color-tape-stripe-02: rgba(45, 80, 60, 0.35);
	--char-color-tape-stripe-03: rgba(90, 65, 110, 0.35);
	}
/* THEME-02 */
	body.theme-02 {
	--char-color-paper-base: rgba(200, 200, 205, 1);
	--char-color-paper-shadow: rgba(180, 180, 185, 1);
	--char-color-paper-edge: rgba(110, 108, 105, 1);
	--char-color-paper-deep: rgba(50, 50, 45, 1);
	--char-color-text-body: rgba(15, 15, 15, 1);
	--char-color-text-faded: rgba(100, 95, 90, 1);
	--char-color-text-accent-01: rgba(70, 65, 110, 1);
	--char-color-text-accent-02: rgba(80, 80, 80, 1);
	--char-color-text-accent-03: rgba(110, 85, 60, 1);
	--char-color-hole: rgba(160, 155, 150, 1);
	--char-color-hole-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
	--char-color-rule-line: rgba(15, 15, 15, 0.1);
	--char-color-rule-accent: rgba(70, 65, 110, 0.3);

	--char-color-tape-fill-01: rgba(70, 65, 110, 0.15);
	--char-color-tape-fill-02: rgba(80, 80, 80, 0.15);
	--char-color-tape-fill-03: rgba(110, 85, 60, 0.15);
	--char-color-tape-border-01: rgba(70, 65, 110, 0.45);
	--char-color-tape-border-02: rgba(80, 80, 80, 0.45);
	--char-color-tape-border-03: rgba(110, 85, 60, 0.45);
	--char-color-tape-stripe-01: rgba(70, 65, 110, 0.35);
	--char-color-tape-stripe-02: rgba(80, 80, 80, 0.35);
	--char-color-tape-stripe-03: rgba(110, 85, 60, 0.35);
	}
/* THEME-03 */
	body.theme-03 {
	--char-color-paper-base: rgba(210, 200, 190, 1);
	--char-color-paper-shadow: rgba(190, 180, 160, 1);
	--char-color-paper-edge: rgba(155, 120, 60, 1);
	--char-color-paper-deep: rgba(90, 60, 20, 1);
	--char-color-text-body: rgba(35, 20, 10, 1);
	--char-color-text-faded: rgba(120, 85, 40, 1);
	--char-color-text-accent-01: rgba(100, 25, 20, 1);
	--char-color-text-accent-02: rgba(30, 70, 65, 1);
	--char-color-text-accent-03: rgba(100, 60, 35, 1);
	--char-color-hole: rgba(190, 160, 95, 1);
	--char-color-hole-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
	--char-color-rule-line: rgba(35, 20, 10, 0.15);
	--char-color-rule-accent: rgba(100, 25, 20, 0.3);

	--char-color-tape-fill-01: rgba(100, 25, 20, 0.15);
	--char-color-tape-fill-02: rgba(30, 70, 65, 0.15);
	--char-color-tape-fill-03: rgba(130, 100, 35, 0.15);
	--char-color-tape-border-01: rgba(100, 25, 20, 0.4);
	--char-color-tape-border-02: rgba(30, 70, 65, 0.4);
	--char-color-tape-border-03: rgba(130, 100, 35, 0.4);
	--char-color-tape-stripe-01: rgba(100, 25, 20, 0.3);
	--char-color-tape-stripe-02: rgba(30, 70, 65, 0.3);
	--char-color-tape-stripe-03: rgba(130, 100, 35, 0.3);
	}
/* THEME-04 */
	body.theme-04 {
	--char-color-paper-base: rgba(30, 30, 35, 1);
	--char-color-paper-shadow: rgba(15, 15, 20, 1);
	--char-color-paper-edge: rgba(60, 60, 65, 1);
	--char-color-paper-deep: rgba(10, 10, 15, 1);
	--char-color-text-body: rgba(225, 225, 230, 1);
	--char-color-text-faded: rgba(130, 130, 135, 1);
	--char-color-text-accent-01: rgba(135, 130, 140, 1);
	--char-color-text-accent-02: rgba(155, 155, 160, 1);
	--char-color-text-accent-03: rgba(130, 130, 135, 1);
	--char-color-hole: rgba(60, 60, 65, 1);
	--char-color-hole-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
	--char-color-rule-line: rgba(225, 225, 230, 0.15);
	--char-color-rule-accent: rgba(225, 225, 230, 0.30);
	--char-color-tape-fill-01: rgba(180, 180, 185, 0.15);
	--char-color-tape-fill-02: rgba(155, 155, 160, 0.15);
	--char-color-tape-fill-03: rgba(130, 130, 135, 0.15);
	--char-color-tape-border-01: rgba(180, 180, 185, 0.40);
	--char-color-tape-border-02: rgba(155, 155, 160, 0.40);
	--char-color-tape-border-03: rgba(130, 130, 135, 0.40);
	--char-color-tape-stripe-01: rgba(180, 180, 185, 0.30);
	--char-color-tape-stripe-02: rgba(155, 155, 160, 0.30);
	--char-color-tape-stripe-03: rgba(130, 130, 135, 0.30);
	}

/* = RESET */
	*, *::before, *::after {
	box-sizing: border-box;
	margin: 0;
	padding: 0;
	}
	html, body {
	width: 100%;
	min-height: 100%;
	font-family: var(--char-font-family-body);
	}
/* = OUTER WRAPPER */
	.char-document-wrapper {
	margin-right: auto;
	position: relative;
	width: 100%;
	overflow: hidden;
	box-sizing: border-box;
	max-width: var(--char-document-max-width);
	padding: var(--char-document-padding-outer);
	-webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent !important;
	}

/* + DOCUMENT SHEET */
	.char-document-sheet {
	position: relative;
	background: var(--char-color-paper-base);
	box-shadow: var(--char-shadow-document-sheet);
	border:
	var(--char-border-width-thin)
	solid var(--char-color-paper-edge);
	border-radius:
	var(--char-border-radius-document-sheet);
	overflow: visible;
	}

	/* inner ornamental double rule border */
	.char-document-sheet::after {
	content: '';
	position: absolute;
	inset: calc(var(--char-unit)*10);
	border: var(--char-border-width-thin)
	solid var(--char-color-paper-edge);
	opacity: 0.30;
	pointer-events: none;
	z-index: 1;
	}
/* = WASH TAPE STRIPS */
	.char-tape-01,
	.char-tape-02,
	.char-tape-03 {
	position: absolute;
	z-index: 12;
	pointer-events: none;
	}
	.char-tape-01 {
	top: calc(var(--char-space-10) * -1);
	left: var(--char-space-44);
	width: var(--char-tape-width-01);
	height: var(--char-tape-height-01);
	background: var(--char-color-tape-fill-01);
	border:
	var(--char-border-width-thin)
	solid var(--char-color-tape-border-01);
	transform: rotate(var(--char-rotate-tape-01));
	border-radius: var(--char-border-radius-tape);
	}	.char-tape-01::before {
	content: '';
	position: absolute;
	inset: var(--char-tape-inner-inset);
	background: repeating-linear-gradient(
	90deg,
	transparent 0px,
	transparent var(--char-tape-stripe-gap),
	var(--char-color-tape-stripe-01)
	var(--char-tape-stripe-gap),
	var(--char-color-tape-stripe-01)
	var(--char-tape-stripe-cycle-01)
	);
	}
	.char-tape-02 {
	top: calc(var(--char-space-09) * -1);
	right: var(--char-space-70);
	width: var(--char-tape-width-02);
	height: var(--char-tape-height-02);
	background: var(--char-color-tape-fill-02);
	border:
	var(--char-border-width-thin)
	solid var(--char-color-tape-border-02);
	transform: rotate(var(--char-rotate-tape-02));
	border-radius: var(--char-border-radius-tape);
	}
	.char-tape-02::before {
	content: '';
	position: absolute;
	inset: var(--char-tape-inner-inset);
	background: repeating-linear-gradient(
	90deg,
	transparent 0px,
	transparent
	var(--char-tape-stripe-transparent-gap),
	var(--char-color-tape-stripe-02)
	var(--char-tape-stripe-transparent-gap),
	var(--char-color-tape-stripe-02)
	var(--char-tape-stripe-cycle-02)
	);
	}
	.char-tape-03 {
	bottom: calc(var(--char-unit) * -9);
	left: 50%;
	transform: translateX(
	var(--char-translate-x-center))
	rotate(var(--char-rotate-tape-03));
	width: var(--char-tape-width-03);
	height: var(--char-tape-height-03);
	background: var(--char-color-tape-fill-03);
	border:
	var(--char-border-width-thin)
	solid var(--char-color-tape-border-03);
	border-radius: var(--char-border-radius-tape);
	}
	.char-tape-03::before {
	content: '';
	position: absolute;
	inset: var(--char-tape-inner-inset);
	background: repeating-linear-gradient(
	90deg,
	transparent 0px,
	transparent var(--char-tape-stripe-gap),
	var(--char-color-tape-stripe-03)
	var(--char-tape-stripe-gap),
	var(--char-color-tape-stripe-03)
	var(--char-tape-stripe-cycle-01)
	);
	}
/* = PUNCH HOLES */
	.char-holes-column {
	position: absolute;
	left: 0;
	top: 0;
	bottom: 0;
	width: var(--char-hole-margin-width);
	border-right:
	var(--char-border-width-thin)
	dashed var(--char-color-rule-line);
	display: flex;
	flex-direction: column;
	justify-content: space-evenly;
	padding: var(--char-hole-padding);
	pointer-events: none;
	z-index: 3;
	}
	.char-hole {
	width: var(--char-hole-size);
	height: var(--char-hole-size);
	border-radius: 50%;
	background: transparent !important;
	border:
	var(--char-border-width-thin)
	solid var(--char-color-hole);
	box-shadow: var(--char-hole-shadow);
	margin: 0 auto;
	mix-blend-mode: multiply;
	}
/* - TOP RIBBON */
	.char-ribbon-top {
	position: relative;
	z-index: 5;
	height: var(--char-ribbon-top-height);
	background: var(--char-color-text-accent-01);
	display: flex;
	align-items: center;
	justify-content: center;
	gap: var(--char-space-12);
	overflow: hidden;
	}
	/* woven grosgrain texture */
	.char-ribbon-top::before {
	content: '';
	position: absolute; inset: 0;
	background: repeating-linear-gradient(
	0deg,
	transparent 0px,
	transparent
	var(--char-space-02),
	rgba(255,255,255,0.05)
	var(--char-space-02),
	rgba(255,255,255,0.05)
	var(--char-space-03)
	),
	repeating-linear-gradient(
	90deg,
	transparent 0px,
	transparent
	var(--char-space-04),
	rgba(255,255,255,0.05)
	var(--char-space-04),
	rgba(255,255,255,0.05)
	var(--char-space-05)
	);
	}

	/* diamond facet gem → jet mourning brooch */
	.char-ribbon-gem-diamond {
	width: var(--char-ribbon-gem-size);
	height: var(--char-ribbon-gem-size);
	background: var(--char-color-text-accent-01);
	transform: rotate(45deg);
	flex-shrink: 0;
	box-shadow: var(--char-text-shadow);
	}
	.char-ribbon-gem-circle {
	width: var(--char-ribbon-circle-size);
	height: var(--char-ribbon-circle-size);
	border-radius: 50%;
	background:	rgba(255,255,255,
	var(--char-opacity-ribbon-circle));
	flex-shrink: 0;
	}
	.char-ribbon-label-text {
	font-family: var(--char-font-family-display);
	font-size: var(--char-font-size-ribbon-text);
	letter-spacing:
	var(--char-letter-spacing-mono-05);
	text-transform: uppercase;
	color:
	rgba(255,255,255,
	var(--char-opacity-ribbon-text));
	}
/* DOCUMENT HEADER */
	.char-document-header {
	position: relative;
	z-index: 50;
	padding: var(--char-document-padding-header);
	border-bottom:
	var(--char-border-width-thin)
	solid var(--char-color-rule-line);
	overflow: visible;
	}

	/* Victorian ornamental title cartouche */
	.char-header-title-block {
	text-align: center;
	padding: var(--char-document-padding-title);
	border-top:
	var(--char-border-width-thin)
	solid var(--char-color-rule-line);
	border-bottom:
	var(--char-border-width-thin)
	solid var(--char-color-rule-line);
	margin:
	var(--char-space-02) 0
	var(--char-space-12);
	position: relative;
	}
	/* ornate corner filigree via pseudo elements */
	.char-header-title-block::before,
	.char-header-title-block::after {
	content: '❧';
	position: absolute;
	top: var(--char-space-04);
	font-size: var(--char-space-14);
	color: var(--char-color-text-accent-01);
	opacity:
	var(--char-opacity-title-corner-bracket);
	line-height: 1;
	}
	.char-header-title-block::before {
	left: var(--char-space-04); }
	.char-header-title-block::after {
	right: var(--char-space-04);
	transform: scaleX(-1); }

	.char-header-note-number {
	font-family: var(--char-font-family-display);
	font-size:
	var(--char-font-size-footnote-number);
	letter-spacing:
	var(--char-letter-spacing-mono-04);
	color: var(--char-color-text-faded);
	text-transform: uppercase;
	margin-bottom: var(--char-space-02);
	}
	.char-header-title-text {
	font-family: var(--char-font-family-script);
	font-size: var(--char-font-size-title);
	font-weight: var(--char-font-weight-normal);
	color: var(--char-color-text-body);
	line-height: var(--char-line-height-script);
	letter-spacing:
	var(--char-letter-spacing-script);
	}
	.char-header-subtitle-text {
	font-family: var(--char-font-family-display);
	font-size: var(--char-font-size-subtitle);
	letter-spacing:
	var(--char-letter-spacing-mono-03);
	color: var(--char-color-text-faded);
	text-transform: uppercase;
	margin-top: var(--char-space-02);
	}
/* FIELD LABELS */
	.char-field-label {
	font-family: var(--char-font-family-display);
	font-size: var(--char-font-size-field-label);
	letter-spacing:
	var(--char-letter-spacing-mono-03);
	text-transform: uppercase;
	color: var(--char-color-text-faded);
	margin-bottom: var(--char-space-02);
	}
/* HEADER CONTROLS ROW */
	.char-header-controls-row {
	display: flex;
	gap: var(--char-space-12);
	align-items: flex-end;
	margin-top: var(--char-space-02);
	overflow: visible;
	}
	.char-header-control-field {
	position: relative;
	flex: 1;
	overflow: visible;
	}
/* CUSTOM DROPDOWN SELECT */
	.char-dropdown-select {
	position: relative;
	cursor: pointer;
	
	outline: none;
	overflow: visible;
	}
	.char-dropdown-select-face {
	display: flex;
	align-items: center;
	justify-content: space-between;
	padding: var(--char-space-02) 0;
	border-bottom:
	var(--char-border-width-thin)
	solid var(--char-color-rule-line);
	transition: border-color
	var(--char-transition-speed-fast);
	}
	.char-dropdown-select:hover
	.char-dropdown-select-face,
	.char-dropdown-select.is-open
	.char-dropdown-select-face {
	border-bottom-color:
	var(--char-color-text-accent-01);
	}
	.char-dropdown-select-current-value {
	font-family: var(--char-font-family-display);
	font-size: var(--char-font-size-field-value);
	letter-spacing:
	var(--char-letter-spacing-mono-01);
	text-transform: uppercase;
	color: var(--char-color-text-accent-02);
	transition:
	color var(--char-transition-speed-fast);
	}
	.char-dropdown-select:hover
	.char-dropdown-select-current-value,
	.char-dropdown-select.is-open
	.char-dropdown-select-current-value {
	color: var(--char-color-text-accent-01);
	}
	.char-dropdown-select-chevron {
	width: var(--char-ribbon-chevron-size);
	height: var(--char-ribbon-chevron-size);
	border-right:
	var(--char-ribbon-chevron-border-width)
	solid var(--char-color-text-faded);
	border-bottom:
	var(--char-ribbon-chevron-border-width)
	solid var(--char-color-text-faded);
	transform: rotate(
	var(--char-rotate-chevron-closed))
	translateY(var(--char-translate-y-chevron));
	transition:	transform
	var(--char-dropdown-unfurl-duration)
	var(--char-dropdown-unfurl-easing),
	border-color
	var(--char-transition-speed-fast);
	flex-shrink: 0;
	}
	.char-dropdown-select.is-open
	.char-dropdown-select-chevron {
	transform:
	rotate(var(--char-rotate-chevron-open))
	translateY(var(--char-translate-y-chevron));
	border-color:
	var(--char-color-text-accent-01);
	}
	.char-dropdown-options-list {
	display: none;
	position: absolute;
	top: calc(100% +
	var(--char-dropdown-vertical-offset));
	left: 0; right: 0;
	z-index: 9999;
	list-style: none;
	background-color:
	var(--char-color-paper-base);
	border:
	var(--char-border-width-thin)
	solid var(--char-color-paper-edge);
	border-top:
	var(--char-border-width-medium)
	solid var(--char-color-text-accent-01);
	border-radius:
	var(--char-border-radius-dropdown);
	box-shadow: var(--char-shadow-dropdown);
	transform-origin: top center;
	}
	.char-dropdown-select.is-open
	.char-dropdown-options-list {
	display: block;
	animation: dropdown-unfurl
	var(--char-dropdown-unfurl-duration)
	var(--char-dropdown-unfurl-easing) both;
	}
	@keyframes dropdown-unfurl {
	from { opacity: 0; transform: scaleY(0.6)
	translateY(-4px);}
	to { opacity: 1; transform: scaleY(1)
	translateY(0);}
	}
	.char-dropdown-select.is-open
	.char-dropdown-option-item {
	animation: dropdown-item-appear
	var(--char-dropdown-unfurl-duration)
	var(--char-dropdown-unfurl-easing) both;
	}
	.char-dropdown-select.is-open
	.char-dropdown-option-item:nth-child(1) {
	animation-delay: 0s; }
	.char-dropdown-select.is-open
	.char-dropdown-option-item:nth-child(2) {
	animation-delay:
	var(--char-dropdown-item-stagger-delay);
	}
	.char-dropdown-select.is-open
	.char-dropdown-option-item:nth-child(3) {
	animation-delay: calc(
	var(--char-dropdown-item-stagger-delay) * 2);
	}
	.char-dropdown-select.is-open
	.char-dropdown-option-item:nth-child(4) {
	animation-delay: calc(
	var(--char-dropdown-item-stagger-delay) * 3);
	}
	@keyframes dropdown-item-appear {
	from { opacity: 0; transform:
	translateY(-6px); }
	to { opacity: 1; transform:
	translateY(0); }
	}
	.char-dropdown-option-item {
	font-family: var(--char-font-family-display);
	font-size:
	var(--char-font-size-dropdown-item);
	letter-spacing:
	var(--char-letter-spacing-mono-02);
	text-transform: uppercase;
	color: var(--char-color-text-faded);
	padding:
	var(--char-space-09)
	var(--char-space-12);
	cursor: pointer;
	background-color: transparent;
	transition:
	background-color
	var(--char-transition-speed-dropdown),
	color var(--char-transition-speed-dropdown);
	}
	.char-dropdown-option-item +
	.char-dropdown-option-item {
	border-top: var(--char-border-width-thin)
	solid var(--char-color-rule-line);
	}
	.char-dropdown-option-item:hover {
	background-color:
	var(--char-color-paper-shadow);
	color: var(--char-color-text-body);
	}
	.char-dropdown-option-item
	.is-selected {
	color: var(--char-color-text-accent-01);
	}
	.char-dropdown-option-item
	.is-selected::before {
	content: '';
	display: inline-block;
	width: var(--char-space-02);
	height: var(--char-space-02);
	border-radius: 50%;
	background: var(--char-color-text-accent-01);
	margin-right: var(--char-space-04);
	vertical-align: middle;
	opacity:
	var(--char-opacity-dropdown-selected-dot);
	}
/* BOTANICAL CORNER SPRIGS */
	.char-spring-branch {
	position: absolute;
	z-index: 7;
	pointer-events: none;
	}
	.char-spring-branch-top-right {
	top: var(--char-space-09);
	right: var(--char-space-08);
	width:
	var(--char-spring-branch-size-top-right);
	height:
	var(--char-spring-branch-size-top-right);
	}
	.char-spring-branch-bottom-left {
	bottom: var(--char-space-24);
	left: var(--char-space-09);
	width:
	var(--char-spring-branch-size-bottom-left);
	height:
	var(--char-spring-branch-size-bottom-left);
	opacity: var(--char-opacity-spring-branch);
	}
	/* thorned stem */
	.char-spring-branch::before {
	content: '';
	position: absolute;
	bottom: 0; left: 50%;
	width: var(--char-border-width-thin);
	height: var(--char-spring-branch-height);
	background: var(--char-color-text-body);
	opacity: var(--char-opacity-spring-branch);
	transform: translateX(
	var(--char-translate-x-center))
	rotate(var(--char-rotate-spring-branch));
	transform-origin: bottom center;
	}
	/* narrow pointed leaves — nightshade */
	.char-spring-leaf {
	position: absolute;
	width: var(--char-spring-leaf-width-large);
	height: var(--char-spring-leaf-height-large);
	border-radius: 0 50% 50% 0;
	background: var(--char-color-text-accent-02);
	opacity: var(--char-opacity-spring-leaf-01);
	}
	.char-spring-leaf-01 {
	left: 30%;
	top: 20%;
	transform: rotate(
	var(--char-rotate-spring-leaf-01)); }
	.char-spring-leaf-02 {
	left: 55%;
	top: 10%;
	transform: rotate(
	var(--char-rotate-spring-leaf-02)); }
	.char-spring-leaf-03 {
	left: 25%; top: 55%;
	width: var(--char-spring-leaf-width-small);
	height: var(--char-spring-leaf-height-small);
	transform: rotate(
	var(--char-rotate-spring-leaf-03));
	opacity: var(--char-opacity-spring-leaf-02);
	}
	/* nightshade berry */
	.char-spring-flower {
	position: absolute;
	top: 0; left: 38%;
	width: var(--char-spring-flower-width);
	height: var(--char-spring-flower-height);
	}
	.char-spring-flower::before,
	.char-spring-flower::after {
	content: '';
	position: absolute;
	border-radius: 50%;
	background: var(--char-color-text-accent-01);
	opacity: var(--char-opacity-spring-flower);
	}
	.char-spring-flower::before {
	width: var(--char-space-05);
	height: var(--char-space-05);
	top: 0;
	left: 0; }
	.char-spring-flower::after {
	width: var(--char-space-03);
	height: var(--char-space-03);
	top: calc(var(--char-space-04)* -1);
	left: var(--char-space-02);
	background: var(--char-color-text-accent-03);
	}
/* MARGINALIA */
	.char-marginalia-note {
	position: absolute;
	right: var(--char-space-01);
	font-family: var(--char-font-family-body);
	font-style: italic;
	font-size: var(--char-font-size-marginalia);
	color: var(--char-color-text-accent-02);
	opacity: var(--char-opacity-marginalia-text);
	transform: rotate(
	var(--char-rotate-marginalia-text));
	transform-origin: right center;
	letter-spacing:
	var(--char-letter-spacing-script);
	pointer-events: none;
	z-index: 6;
	white-space: nowrap;
	}
	.char-marginalia-note-top { top: 42%; }
/* DOCUMENT FOOTER */
	.char-document-footer {
	position: relative;
	z-index: 5;
	padding: var(--char-document-padding-footer);
	border-top:
	var(--char-border-width-thin)
	solid var(--char-color-rule-line);
	display: grid;
	grid-template-columns: 1fr auto 1fr;
	align-items: end;
	gap: var(--char-space-06);
	}
	.char-footer-column {
	font-family: var(--char-font-family-display);
	font-size: var(--char-font-size-footer-text);
	letter-spacing:
	var(--char-letter-spacing-mono-02);
	color: var(--char-color-text-faded);
	text-transform: uppercase;
	line-height: var(--char-line-height-footer);
	}
	.char-footer-column.align-center {
	text-align: center; }
	.char-footer-column.align-right  {
	text-align: right; }
	.char-footer-page-number {
	color: var(--char-color-text-body);
	font-family: var(--char-font-family-script);
	font-size: var(--char-font-size-page-number);
	letter-spacing: 0;
	}
	.char-footer-underline-row {
	border-top:
	var(--char-border-width-thin)
	solid var(--char-color-rule-line);
	margin-top: var(--char-space-03);
	padding-top: var(--char-space-03);
	}
	/* memento mori fleuron */
	.char-footer-heart-decoration {
	display: inline-block;
	width: var(--char-footer-heart-width);
	height: var(--char-footer-heart-height);
	position: relative;
	margin: 0 var(--char-space-03);
	vertical-align: middle;
	opacity: var(--char-opacity-footer-heart);
	}
	.char-footer-heart-decoration::before {
	content: '';
	position: absolute;
	left: 0; top: 0;
	width: var(--char-footer-heart-dot-size);
	height: var(--char-footer-heart-dot-size);
	border-radius: 50% 50% 0 0;
	background: var(--char-color-text-accent-01);
	transform: rotate(
	var(--char-rotate-footer-heart-left));
	transform-origin: 0% 100%;
	}
	.char-footer-heart-decoration::after {
	content: '';
	position: absolute;
	right: 0; top: 0;
	width: var(--char-footer-heart-dot-size);
	height: var(--char-footer-heart-dot-size);
	border-radius: 50% 50% 0 0;
	background: var(--char-color-text-accent-01);
	transform: rotate(
	var(--char-rotate-footer-heart-right));
	transform-origin: 100% 100%;
	}
/* BOTTOM RIBBON */
	.char-ribbon-bottom {
	position: relative;
	z-index: 5;
	height: var(--char-ribbon-bottom-height);
	background: var(--char-color-text-body);
	opacity: var(--char-opacity-bottom-ribbon);
	}

/* DOCUMENT BODY */
	.char-document-body {
	position: relative;
	z-index: 5;
	padding: var(--char-document-padding-inner);
	}
	.char-document-body-ruled-lines {
	position: relative;
	background-image: repeating-linear-gradient(
	180deg,
	transparent 0px,
	transparent var(--char-rule-line-spacing),
	var(--char-color-rule-line)
	var(--char-rule-line-spacing),
	var(--char-color-rule-line)
	var(--char-rule-line-height)
	);
	padding: var(--char-space-02) 0;
	}
	.char-document-body-ruled-lines::before {
	content: '';
	position: absolute;
	left: var(--char-rule-margin-line-offset);
	top: 0; bottom: 0;
	width: var(--char-border-width-thin);
	background: var(--char-color-rule-accent);
	}
/* LETTER TEXT CONTENT */
	/* Base Text ✔️*/
		.char-letter-text-content {
		margin-top: 0 !important;
		margin-bottom: 0 !important;
		font-family: var(--char-font-family-body);
		font-size: var(--char-font-size-body);
		font-weight: var(--char-font-weight-body);
		line-height:
